description: Semantic topic search across the podcast catalog. Unlike `search_episodes` (which does lexical/keyword matching), this tool understands meaning: a query for 'AI safety' will match episodes about 'AI alignment', 'AGI risk', or 'frontier model evaluation' even if they don't contain the exact phrase. R

labels.name: get_transcript
labels.description: Fetch a bounded transcript chunk for a specific episode using its show and episode GUIDs. Use `next_cursor` to continue reading.

labels.name: give_feedback
labels.description: Send structured feedback about bugs, missing data, unclear behavior, or feature requests.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_episodes, get_latest_episodes, search_episodes_by_topic, get_transcript · Public sink: give_feedback.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_episodes, get_latest_episodes, search_episodes_by_topic, get_transcript · Public sink: give_feedback

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
